Jones Day, Defined Benefits Pension Plan (value not readily ascertainable): Eligible for $47,944.96 annually at age 65.
Jones Day returned my capital contribution upon my departure from the Firm on January 17, 2025. (2019-08-01)

Upon my departure from Jones Day, the Firm withheld $404,000 as a tax retainer to cover state and foreign taxes paid by the Firm on my behalf.  Any excess amounts withheld by the firm that end up not being used for account reconciliation and tax purposes will be refunded to me no later than 5 years after my departure. (2025-01-01)

When I reach the age of 65, I will receive approximately $47,944.96 annually as part of the Jones Day defined benefit pension plan, assuming plan investment performance meets expectations. (2019-08-01)
Upon my departure from Jones Day, the Firm withheld $46,500 as a mandatory retirement contribution that will be deposited in my 401K at the end of 2025. (2025-01-01)

Loan was taken to contribute to Jones Day's capital account. Filer took 2 loans a year from 2020-2024, for a total of 8 loans.    Each loan was approximately $50,000.   Loan balance was paid in its entirety by Jones Day law firm.  Filer no longer has a financial liability to KeyBank.
